# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Areas changed

- [ ] Platform overview
- [ ] Engineering stages
- [ ] Template Library
- [ ] Examples
- [ ] Project Workspace
- [ ] Navigation / MkDocs configuration
- [ ] CSS / visual design
- [ ] Repository support / GitHub automation

## Evidence updated

- [ ] Relevant README or landing page updated
- [ ] Navigation updated
- [ ] Template/example/workspace links checked
- [ ] Screenshots reviewed when UI changed
- [ ] `mkdocs build --strict` passes

## AI assistance

- [ ] No material AI assistance
- [ ] AI assistance was used and reviewed by a human
- [ ] Material AI assistance is recorded where appropriate

## Risks / follow-up

List known risks, limitations, broken links, deferred work, or follow-up items.
